title: Check If Two String Arrays are Equivalent
titleCn: 检查两个字符串数组是否相等

testcases.input: word1 = ["ab", "c"], word2 = ["a", "bc"] Output: true Explanation: word1 represents string "ab" + "c" -> "abc" word2 represents string "a" + "bc" -> "abc" The strings are the same, so return true.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: word1 represents string "ab" + "c" -> "abc" word2 represents string "a" + "bc" -> "abc" The strings are the same, so return true.
